tasks.label: 1. Build executable

args: cl.exe /MD /GS /O2 /Zi /EHsc /utf-8 /Fe:"${workspaceFolder}\main.exe" "${workspaceFolder}\main.cpp" /I"${workspaceFolder}\include" /link /ignore:4099 /LIBPATH:"${workspaceFolder}\lib\static" libhybrid-pq-cp-abe.lib liboqs.lib cryptlib.lib librabe_ffi.lib bcrypt.lib advapi32.lib ntdll.lib /MACHINE:X64

tasks.detail: Compile main.cpp and link with libhybrid-pq-cp-abe

args: cl.exe /MD /GS /O2 /Zi /EHsc /utf-8 /LD /DBUILD_DLL /Fe:"${workspaceFolder}\lib\dynamic\libhybrid-pq-cp-abe.dll" "${workspaceFolder}\hybrid-cp-abe.cpp" "${workspaceFolder}\hybrid-oqs-abe.cpp" /I"${workspaceFolder}\include" /link /ignore:4099 /LIBPATH:"${workspaceFolder}\lib\static" librabe_ffi.lib liboqs.lib cryptlib.lib bcrypt.lib advapi32.lib ntdll.lib /MACHINE:X64 && echo Cleaning up Import Library and Export File... && del /Q "${workspaceFolder}\lib\dynamic\libhybrid-pq-cp-abe.lib" "${workspaceFolder}\lib\dynamic\libhybrid-pq-cp-abe.exp"
g++ -O2 -g -Wall -fPIC -DBUILD_DLL -Iinclude hybrid-cp-abe.cpp hybrid-oqs-abe.cpp -shared -o lib/dynamic/libhybrid-pq-cp-abe.so lib/static/libcryptopp.a lib/static/librabe_ffi.a lib/static/liboqs.a

tasks.label: 3. Build static library

args: echo Compiling... && cl.exe /MD /GS /O2 /Zi /EHsc /utf-8 /c "${workspaceFolder}\hybrid-cp-abe.cpp" "${workspaceFolder}\hybrid-oqs-abe.cpp" /I"${workspaceFolder}\include" && echo Archiving... && lib.exe /OUT:"${workspaceFolder}\lib\static\libhybrid-pq-cp-abe.lib" "hybrid-cp-abe.obj" "hybrid-oqs-abe.obj" /LIBPATH:"${workspaceFolder}\lib\static" librabe_ffi.lib liboqs.lib cryptlib.lib bcrypt.lib advapi32.lib ntdll.lib && echo Cleaning up... && del /Q "hybrid-cp-abe.obj" "hybrid-oqs-abe.obj" && echo Done! Output at lib\static\libhybrid-pq-cp-abe.lib

g++ -O2 -g -Wall -c hybrid-cp-abe.cpp hybrid-oqs-abe.cpp -Iinclude -fPIC && cd lib/static && ar rcs libhybrid-pq-cp-abe.a ../../hybrid-cp-abe.o ../../hybrid-oqs-abe.o libcryptopp.a librabe_ffi.a liboqs.a && rm -f ../../hybrid-cp-abe.o ../../hybrid-oqs-abe.o

tasks.detail: Build static library (libhybrid-pq-cp-abe.lib/.a) and clean up temporary files
